MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-31-2019 IN 206, DEFENDANT CREIGHTON CASPER'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL PURSUANT TO STIPULATION WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES BY MICHELLE WEISS, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF AND MARIA ZHURNALOVA-JUPPUNOV, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE ANY COURTESY COPIES AS REQUIRED BY SF LOCAL RULE 2.7(B). HOWEVER, INSTEAD OF THE COURT DENYING THE MOTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AND MOVING PARTY HAVING TO REFILE THE MOTION, THE DEFENDANT OPTED TO PAY THE $60 FILING FEE. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/04/19 IS CONTINUED TO 12/09/19 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER STIPULATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
